description: Physical site audit event emitted by AuditWitnessCell (phase 5, leaderNode levi). **Witness invariant**: N ≥ 2 independent robot DID signatures REQUIRED (constitutional, per CLAUDE.md). Audits are periodic post-deployment checks of the physical site against the originally-proposed plan + the recorded construction progress. Per ADR-2605201400 + ADR-2605192415.

planId.description: Original deployment plan being verified against.

auditedAt.description: Timestamp of the physical audit visit.

auditOutcome.description: Audit outcome. `fail-safety-critical` triggers immediate halt + Council Lv6+ escalation.

findingsIpfsCid.description: REQUIRED when auditOutcome is any `*-findings` or `fail-*` value; IPFS CID of the findings report.

remediationDeadlineAt.description: REQUIRED for any non-pass outcome; deadline for remediation. Validator MAY enforce reasonable bounds per outcome severity.

robotWitnessSignatures.description: **Constitutional witness invariant**: ≥2 independent robot DID signatures. Identical to recordConstructionProgress invariant — distinct DIDs required.

physicalEvidenceCids.description: IPFS CIDs of physical evidence (photos / sensor snapshots / measurement reports) for the audit event.

robotDid.description: DID of form `did:web:etzhayyim.com:kuniumi:robot:<serial>`. Distinct from other entries in the array.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over (auditEventId + siteId + auditedAt + auditOutcome + findingsIpfsCid).
